tagline: We are here so you worry less

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Our Priority. Worry-Free
Since 2015
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool for the fun, not the work. Hofmann Pools handles the maintenance, leak repairs, and equipment fixes so all you do is enjoy crystal-clear water every time you step outside.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">Charlotte's Leak Specialists
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to complex leak detection, Hofmann Pools has the experience and dedication to keep your pool running perfectly all season long.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced leak detection techniques that pinpoint problems fast with minimal disruption. We find it, fix it, and get your pool back to full capacity.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly care backed by our Clear Pool Guarantee. Your dedicated specialist handles chemicals, skimming, filters, and equipment checks.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — we diagnose and repair it right the first time. Most repairs completed same-visit to minimize downtime.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of new pool equipment including energy-efficient pumps, variable-speed motors, heaters, and automation systems.

cards.title: Pool Structural Repair
cards.description: Surface cracks, plumbing issues, and structural problems addressed with lasting solutions. We fix the root cause, not just the symptoms.

cards.title: Custom Service Plans
cards.description: Every pool is different. We build a tailored maintenance plan around your pool's unique needs, usage patterns, and budget.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll come out, inspect everything, and provide an honest, no-pressure quote — typically within 48 hours.

steps.title: Meet Your Dedicated Specialist
steps.description: You're assigned a dedicated pool specialist who knows your pool inside and out. They handle every visit and you get their direct contact for questions anytime.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, your equipment runs smoothly, and you never stress about maintenance again. That's the Hofmann Pools difference — backed by our Clear Pool Guarantee.

about.label: Why Charlotte Trusts Hofmann Pools
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Hands-On Pool Care Since 2015
about.description: Hofmann Pools was founded by Will Hofmann with one simple belief: pool owners deserve reliable, transparent service from people who actually care. Over the past 11 years, we've built our reputation one pool at a time across Charlotte — showing up on schedule, communicating clearly, and standing behind every visit with our Clear Pool Guarantee.

features.title: Dedicated Specialist, Direct Contact
features.description: Every maintenance client gets one assigned specialist who knows your pool. You get their direct number — no call centers, no runaround.

features.title: Clear Pool Guarantee
features.description: Every weekly maintenance plan is backed by our Clear Pool Guarantee. If your pool isn't clear, we come back and make it right — no extra charge.

features.title: Owner Involved in Every Account
features.description: Will Hofmann personally oversees operations and stays involved in every client relationship. You're never just a number here.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Every plan includes our Clear Pool Guarantee and a dedicated specialist.

guarantee.headline: Our Clear Pool Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't crystal clear after any weekly maintenance visit, call your dedicated specialist and we'll come back to make it right — at no additional cost. We don't consider the job done until your water is sparkling and you're completely satisfied. That's been our promise since 2015, and we've never backed down from it.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new maintenance clients are on the schedule within one week. We'll start with a thorough pool assessment, then build a custom plan and assign your dedicated specialist. For leak detection or urgent repairs, we often schedule within 48 hours.

faqs.question: What does the Clear Pool Guarantee cover?
faqs.answer: If your pool isn't clear after any scheduled maintenance visit, contact your dedicated specialist and we'll return to address the issue at no additional charge. It's that simple — we stand behind every visit.

faqs.question: Do I get the same technician every time?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every weekly maintenance client is assigned a dedicated specialist who learns the ins and outs of your specific pool. You also get their direct contact information so you can reach them anytime with questions.

faqs.question: How does your leak detection work?
faqs.answer: We use advanced, minimally invasive techniques to locate leaks precisely without unnecessary demolition. Once found, we provide clear repair options with upfront pricing. Most leak repairs are completed quickly with minimal disruption to your pool area.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: No long-term contracts required. We believe in earning your trust every single visit. You can adjust or cancel your service plan at any time — no cancellation fees, no penalties.

testimonials.name: Charlotte Homeowner
testimonials.text: A great experience. Fantastic job for a reasonable price. Friendly and professional. Takes the worry out of pool maintenance.

testimonials.name: Will's Client
testimonials.text: Will and his team are the best. Knowledgeable, on time, and extremely thorough. They genuinely care about getting it right.

testimonials.name: New Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Jack was able to answer all my questions with clear and easy instructions. I really appreciate his knowledge transfer. Made the whole process stress-free.

contact.subtitle: Get a free pool assessment and honest quote — no pressure, no contracts. Just straightforward pool care from Charlotte's trusted team.
